description: A powerful 'ndrina (clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in San Luca, Calabria, Italy. Active since the late 19th century, it is considered one of the most influential 'ndrine of all time. The clan is involved in drug trafficking, particularly heroin and cocaine, and has ties to other 'Ndrangheta families. It has been implicated in historical events such as the kidnapping of Aldo Moro.

country_links.context: The organization routes cocaine through Germany.
